rules.description: Purging production queues/topics is unconditionally forbidden — use a change management process
rules.message: Purging production queues is forbidden through this tool. Use your organization's change management process.

rules.description: FLUSHALL and FLUSHDB destroy entire Redis databases and are always denied
rules.message: Redis FLUSHALL/FLUSHDB is forbidden — these commands delete all data in the Redis instance.

rules.description: Deleting a topic with active consumer groups will break running applications
rules.message: Cannot delete topic/queue with active consumer groups. Stop all consumers first.

rules.description: Deleting any topic or queue requires explicit human approval
rules.message: Topic/queue deletion is permanent and requires explicit approval.

rules.description: Purging non-production queues still requires approval due to data loss risk
rules.message: Queue purge will delete all messages permanently. Explicit approval required.

rules.description: Consumer offset reset causes re-processing or message skipping — requires approval
rules.message: Consumer offset reset requires approval — affected consumers will re-process or skip messages.

rules.description: Altering retention policy can cause irreversible data loss
rules.message: Altering retention policy requires approval — reducing retention will delete older messages.

rules.description: Configuration changes require dry-run to preview impact
rules.message: Configuration changes require dry-run validation before applying.

rules.description: Publishing messages to production topics carries medium risk
rules.message: Publishing to production topics requires dry-run preview — verify message format and target.

rules.description: Listing or describing topics and queues is non-destructive
Consuming messages from non-production queues is low risk
rules.message: Consuming from non-production queues is auto-approved.
